testcase.name: tests.test_challenge_api
testcase.error:
maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:31: in __check_health response = treq.get( .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/treq/api.py:23: in get return _client(kwargs).get(url, headers=headers, _stacklevel=4, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/treq/client.py:151: in get return self.request("GET", url, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: HTTPClient.request() got an unexpected keyword argument 'verify'
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_challenge_api.py:8: in <module> class TestChallengeAPI(unittest.TestCase): tests/test_challenge_api.py:11: in TestChallengeAPI api = maproulette.Challenge(config) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/challenge.py:11: in __init__ super().__init__(configuration=config) maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:18: in __init__ if self.__check_health(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:42: in __check_health except treq.exceptions.ConnectionError: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'treq' has no attribute 'exceptions'

During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_project_api.py:7: in <module> class TestProjectAPI(unittest.TestCase): tests/test_project_api.py:10: in TestProjectAPI api = maproulette.Project(config) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/project.py:11: in __init__ super().__init__(configuration=config) maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:18: in __init__ if self.__check_health(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:42: in __check_health except treq.exceptions.ConnectionError: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'treq' has no attribute 'exceptions'

testcase.name: tests.test_server
testcase.error:

During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_server.py:9: in <module> class TestAPI(unittest.TestCase): tests/test_server.py:12: in TestAPI server = maproulette.MapRouletteServer(configuration=config) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:18: in __init__ if self.__check_health(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:42: in __check_health except treq.exceptions.ConnectionError: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'treq' has no attribute 'exceptions'
